feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Azerbaycan’da halkının sabrı taştı: Ya Karabağ ya ölüm

link.title: Azerbaycan’da halkının sabrı taştı: Ya Karabağ ya ölüm

entry.content: Ermenistan’ın hain saldırılarına karşı Azerbaycan’ın birçok bölgesinde ve özellikle Bakü’de on binlerce vatandaş “Ya Karabağ ya ölüm” sloganları eşliğinde orduya moral verdi.
entry.summary: Ermenistan’ın hain saldırılarına karşı Azerbaycan’ın birçok bölgesinde ve özellikle Bakü’de on binlerce vatandaş “Ya Karabağ ya ölüm” sloganları eşliğinde orduya moral verdi.

entry.title: Coronavirus - Le seuil d’alerte est désormais dépassé en Mayenne et les autorités annoncent un doublement du nombre de personnes hospitalisées dans le département

link.title: Coronavirus - Le seuil d’alerte est désormais dépassé en Mayenne et les autorités annoncent un doublement du nombre de personnes hospitalisées dans le département

entry.content:
La Mayenne, qui compte plusieurs foyers de Covid-19, a atteint le seuil d’alerte avec 50,1 nouveaux cas pour 100.000 habitants détectés en 7 jours, selon l’agence sanitaire Santé publique France (SpF). Les critères des indicateurs de surveillance épidémique, classent en « seuil de vigilance » quand ce sont entre 10 et 50 personnes qui sont contaminées pour 100 000 habitants.
Le département est donc légèrement au-dessus du seuil de vigilance. Il s’agit d’une estimation basée le nombre de tests RT-PCR (tests effectués dans le nez) positifs pour 100.000 habitants, par semaine (calculé sur la période J-3 à J-9). Dans le département, on a aussi observé un doublement du nombre de personnes hospitalisées. De 8, il y a une semaine, il est passé à 16 au 14 juillet.
Sur la semaine du 28 juin au 4 juillet, ce taux était inférieur à 10/100.000 habitants dans tous les départements de France métropolitaine sauf pour la Mayenne (45/100.000). A Mayotte, le taux d’incidence, de 16,5 selon les dernières données, est en régression par rapport à la semaine précédente (35,8).
L’incidence est l’un des indicateurs de surveillance de l’évolution de l’épidémie. En font également partie le taux de positifs aux tests de diagnostic virologique (qui permettent de savoir si on est contaminé et détecter une éventuelle reprise de l’épidémie) et le taux de reproduction effectif (R) qui correspond au nombre moyen de personnes qu’un malade contamine.
entry.summary: La Mayenne, qui compte plusieurs foyers de Covid-19, a atteint le seuil d’alerte avec 50,1 nouveaux cas pour 100.000 habitants détectés en 7 jours, selon l’agence sanitaire Santé publique France (SpF). Les critères des indicateurs de surveillance épidémique, classent en « seuil de vigilance » quand ce sont entre 10 et 50 personnes qui sont contaminées pour 100 000 habitants. Le département est donc légèrement au-dessus du seuil de vigilance. Il s’agit d’une estimation basée le nombre de tests RT-PCR (tests effectués dans le nez) positifs pour 100.000 habitants, par semaine (calculé sur la période J-3 à J-9). Dans le département, on a aussi observé un doublement du nombre de personnes hospitalisées. De 8, il y a une semaine, il est passé à 16 au 14 juillet. Sur la semaine du 28 juin au 4 juillet, ce taux était inférieur à 10/100.000 habitants dans tous les départements de France métropolitaine sauf pour la Mayenne (45/100.000). A Mayotte, le taux d’incidence, de 16,5 selon les dernières données, est en régression par rapport à la semaine précédente (35,8). L’incidence est l’un des indicateurs de surveillance de l’évolution de l’épidémie. En font également partie le taux de positifs aux tests de diagnostic virologique (qui permettent de savoir si on est contaminé et détecter une éventuelle reprise de l’épidémie) et le taux de reproduction effectif (R) qui correspond au nombre moyen de personnes qu’un malade contamine.

entry.title: ✅ Louis de Funès : pourquoi sa famille n’a pas touché le pactole

link.title: ✅ Louis de Funès : pourquoi sa famille n’a pas touché le pactole

entry.content:
Please Subscribe:
✍ Pendant le confinement les films de Louis de Funès ont diverti les Français. L’acteur comique est une valeur sûre, et les longs-métrages dans lesquels il apparaît connaissent à chaque fois des records d’audience. Des diffusions qui rapportent plus de 500 millions d’euros par an à la Gaumont comme le révèlent nos confrères du Figaro. Un montant qui avoisinerait même les 1,5 million d’euros par an si l’on ajoute les recettes des films qui appartiennent à d’autres particuliers. Un joli pactole dont les héritiers de l’acteur ne voient néanmoins pas la couleur. .La succession compte trois personnes depuis le décès de l’acteur en 1983, puis de sa femme Jeanne en 2015 : la veuve de son fils Daniel, mort d’un infarctus en 2017 et ses deux autres fils Olivier et Patrick. Trois personnes qui passent à côté d’une coquette somme d’argent. Et pour cause : "quand Louis de Funès a enfin connu le succès, après 50 ans, il a toujours demandé du cash plutôt que des pourcentages sur les recettes à v …
#Cinéma, #famille, #héritage, #argent
entry.summary: Please Subscribe: ✍ Pendant le confinement les films de Louis de Funès ont diverti les Français. L’acteur comique est une valeur sûre, et les longs-métrages dans lesquels il apparaît connaissent à chaque fois des records d’audience. Des diffusions qui rapportent plus de 500 millions d’euros par an à la Gaumont comme le révèlent nos confrères du Figaro. Un montant qui avoisinerait même les 1,5 million d’euros par an si l’on ajoute les recettes des films qui appartiennent à d’autres particuliers. Un joli pactole dont les héritiers de l’acteur ne voient néanmoins pas la couleur. .La succession compte trois personnes depuis le décès de l’acteur en 1983, puis de sa femme Jeanne en 2015 : la veuve de son fils Daniel, mort d’un infarctus en 2017 et ses deux autres fils Olivier et Patrick. Trois personnes qui passent à côté d’une coquette somme d’argent. Et pour cause : "quand Louis de Funès a enfin connu le succès, après 50 ans, il a toujours demandé du cash plutôt que des pourcentages sur les recettes à v … #Cinéma, #famille, #héritage, #argent

entry.title: Only Fools And Horses (Special 09) - The Jolly Boys’ Outing - Part 2 - 1981

link.title: Only Fools And Horses (Special 09) - The Jolly Boys’ Outing - Part 2 - 1981

entry.content:
Only Fools and Horses…. is a British television sitcom created and written by John Sullivan. Seven series were originally broadcast on BBC One in the United Kingdom from 1981 to 1991, with sixteen sporadic Christmas specials aired until the end of the show in 2003. Episodes are regularly repeated on UKTV comedy channel Gold.
Set in Peckham in south-east London, it stars David Jason as ambitious market trader Derek "Del Boy" Trotter, Nicholas Lyndhurst as his younger brother Rodney Trotter, and Lennard Pearce as their elderly Grandad as their sidekick. Backed by a strong supporting cast, the series follows the Trotters’ highs and lows in life, in particular their attempts to get rich.
After Lennard Pearce’s death in 1984, the show introduced a new sidekick Uncle Albert, the boys’ great uncle played by Buster Merryfield. From 1988 onwards, the show features regular characters in Del Boy and Rodney’s love interests, Raquel (Tessa Peake-Jones) and Cassandra (Gwyneth Strong) respectively. Other recurring characters include haughty car dealer Boycie (John Challis), dim-witted road sweeper Trigger (Roger Lloyd-Pack), lorry driver Denzil (Paul Barber), obnoxious spiv Mickey Pearce (Patrick Murray) and bartender Mike (Kenneth MacDonald).
The show achieved consistently high ratings, and the 1996 episode "Time on Our Hands" (originally billed as the last ever episode) holds the record for the highest UK audience for a sitcom episode, attracting over 24.3 million viewers. Critically and popularly acclaimed, the series received numerous awards, including recognition from BAFTA, the National Television Awards and the Royal Television Society, as well as winning individual accolades for both Sullivan and Jason. It was voted Britain’s Best Sitcom in a 2004 BBC poll. In a 2001 Channel 4 poll Del Boy was ranked fourth on their list of the 100 Greatest TV Characters. The series influenced British culture, contributing several words and phrases to the English language. It spawned an extensive range of merchandise, including books, videos, DVDs, toys, and board games.
entry.summary: Only Fools and Horses…. is a British television sitcom created and written by John Sullivan. Seven series were originally broadcast on BBC One in the United Kingdom from 1981 to 1991, with sixteen sporadic Christmas specials aired until the end of the show in 2003. Episodes are regularly repeated on UKTV comedy channel Gold. Set in Peckham in south-east London, it stars David Jason as ambitious market trader Derek "Del Boy" Trotter, Nicholas Lyndhurst as his younger brother Rodney Trotter, and Lennard Pearce as their elderly Grandad as their sidekick. Backed by a strong supporting cast, the series follows the Trotters’ highs and lows in life, in particular their attempts to get rich. After Lennard Pearce’s death in 1984, the show introduced a new sidekick Uncle Albert, the boys’ great uncle played by Buster Merryfield. From 1988 onwards, the show features regular characters in Del Boy and Rodney’s love interests, Raquel (Tessa Peake-Jones) and Cassandra (Gwyneth Strong) respectively. Other recurring characters include haughty car dealer Boycie (John Challis), dim-witted road sweeper Trigger (Roger Lloyd-Pack), lorry driver Denzil (Paul Barber), obnoxious spiv Mickey Pearce (Patrick Murray) and bartender Mike (Kenneth MacDonald). The show achieved consistently high ratings, and the 1996 episode "Time on Our Hands" (originally billed as the last ever episode) holds the record for the highest UK audience for a sitcom episode, attracting over 24.3 million viewers. Critically and popularly acclaimed, the series received numerous awards, including recognition from BAFTA, the National Television Awards and the Royal Television Society, as well as winning individual accolades for both Sullivan and Jason. It was voted Britain’s Best Sitcom in a 2004 BBC poll. In a 2001 Channel 4 poll Del Boy was ranked fourth on their list of the 100 Greatest TV Characters. The series influenced British culture, contributing several words and phrases to the English language. It spawned an extensive range of merchandise, including books, videos, DVDs, toys, and board games.

entry.title: Facts About Ice Cream

link.title: Facts About Ice Cream

entry.content:
Today is National Ice Cream Day.
To celebrate CNN compiled some little known facts about America’s favorite frozen treat.
Ice cream sales were boosted by prohibition. New technologies made it easier than ever to manufacture and cool ice cream, sending its popularity soaring.
According to the International Dairy Foods Association. the average American consumes more than 20 pounds of ice cream each year.
What’s the most popular flavor in the United States?
According to the International Dairy Foods Association it’s vanilla.
entry.summary: Today is National Ice Cream Day. To celebrate CNN compiled some little known facts about America’s favorite frozen treat. Ice cream sales were boosted by prohibition. New technologies made it easier than ever to manufacture and cool ice cream, sending its popularity soaring. According to the International Dairy Foods Association. the average American consumes more than 20 pounds of ice cream each year. What’s the most popular flavor in the United States? According to the International Dairy Foods Association it’s vanilla.

entry.title: Pollution : opération nettoyage sur une plage de la Côte d’Azur

link.title: Pollution : opération nettoyage sur une plage de la Côte d’Azur

entry.content:
Les fonds marins sont gravement menacés par la pollution. Samedi 18 juillet, à Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat (Alpes-Maritimes), une opération nettoyage était organisée. L’occasion de montrer au grand public l’impact des déchets sur la vie marine
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Les fonds marins sont gravement menacés par la pollution. Samedi 18 juillet, à Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat (Alpes-Maritimes), une opération nettoyage était organisée. L’occasion de montrer au grand public l’impact des déchets sur la vie marine Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Kargil War: Rifleman Sanjay Kumar, Pakistan को सबक सिखाने वाला जिंदा ‘Param Vir’ वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Kargil War: Rifleman Sanjay Kumar, Pakistan को सबक सिखाने वाला जिंदा ‘Param Vir’ वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
16 years of the tragic war at Kargil could not take the painful memories away. They continue to haunt us deep inside. The bloodshed that accompanied the war still makes the families of the martyrs cringe. Then how can the denizens of India ever forget the soldiers who fought with great tenacity for the love of nation?
भारत पाकिस्तान के बीच कारगिल वॉर में लड़ने वाला हर एक सिपाही देश का हीरो था. लेकिन कुछ योद्धा ऐसे थे जिन्होंने अपने साहस और बलिदान से मिसाल कायम की. जिसके लिए उन्हें सेना का सर्वोच्च सम्मान परमवीर चक्र से सम्मानित किया गया. कारगिल की लड़ाई के दौरान 4 बहादुरों को परम वीर चक्र के सम्मानित किया गया है, लेकिन चारों वीर सैनिकों में इस सम्मान को खुद अपने हाथों से प्राप्त करने वाले वे एक मात्र सैनिक हैं और उनका नाम है राइफलमैन संजय कुमार।
#KargilWar #RiflemanSanjayKumar #ParamveerChakra #OneindiaHindi
entry.summary: 16 years of the tragic war at Kargil could not take the painful memories away. They continue to haunt us deep inside. The bloodshed that accompanied the war still makes the families of the martyrs cringe. Then how can the denizens of India ever forget the soldiers who fought with great tenacity for the love of nation? भारत पाकिस्तान के बीच कारगिल वॉर में लड़ने वाला हर एक सिपाही देश का हीरो था. लेकिन कुछ योद्धा ऐसे थे जिन्होंने अपने साहस और बलिदान से मिसाल कायम की. जिसके लिए उन्हें सेना का सर्वोच्च सम्मान परमवीर चक्र से सम्मानित किया गया. कारगिल की लड़ाई के दौरान 4 बहादुरों को परम वीर चक्र के सम्मानित किया गया है, लेकिन चारों वीर सैनिकों में इस सम्मान को खुद अपने हाथों से प्राप्त करने वाले वे एक मात्र सैनिक हैं और उनका नाम है राइफलमैन संजय कुमार। #KargilWar #RiflemanSanjayKumar #ParamveerChakra #OneindiaHindi

entry.title: Virgin Boys Part 2 Episode -1 Streaming Now

link.title: Virgin Boys Part 2 Episode -1 Streaming Now

entry.content:
#virginboyspart2 #virginboyspart2fullepisodes #virginboyswatchonline
When their virginity enigma is still steady, alas! their hot neighbour is partially ready.. When the plan of action is well-executed, their fortuity gets somehow uprooted. Will Chuchu squander his virginity? Virgin Boys - Part II Staytunned
Cast :-
Shivam Aggarwal ( Chuchu ), Rohan Pratap Singh ( Gagan ), Keshav: Sachin Choudhary ( Chomu ), Marina Kuwar ( Shailja ), Sarika Raghwa ( Aahana)
Director :- Raj Thakur
Taqdeer ke mare Virgin bechare, plan inke ek se badh ker ek, fir bhi ho jate fail saare. Ab kya naya tareeka apanaenge, aur kaise apni virginity se nijaat paenge. Virgin boys ki nayi sharaaraten Part-2 mein. Virgin Boys Part-2 Releasing on 10th July.
The web series is starring Marina, The girl who has been seen in the most watchable shows like CID and AAHAT as well as she has been seen in the Bollywood films too like Zindagi Tum, Jaggu, and Dada Innocent. Marina will play a prominent role in this web series. She has also revealed her feeling in an interview that she wants to see that which character her fans will accept? She also said that she is looking forward to play the role in this web series.
entry.summary: #virginboyspart2 #virginboyspart2fullepisodes #virginboyswatchonline When their virginity enigma is still steady, alas! their hot neighbour is partially ready.. When the plan of action is well-executed, their fortuity gets somehow uprooted. Will Chuchu squander his virginity? Virgin Boys - Part II Staytunned Cast :- Shivam Aggarwal ( Chuchu ), Rohan Pratap Singh ( Gagan ), Keshav: Sachin Choudhary ( Chomu ), Marina Kuwar ( Shailja ), Sarika Raghwa ( Aahana) Director :- Raj Thakur Taqdeer ke mare Virgin bechare, plan inke ek se badh ker ek, fir bhi ho jate fail saare. Ab kya naya tareeka apanaenge, aur kaise apni virginity se nijaat paenge. Virgin boys ki nayi sharaaraten Part-2 mein. Virgin Boys Part-2 Releasing on 10th July. The web series is starring Marina, The girl who has been seen in the most watchable shows like CID and AAHAT as well as she has been seen in the Bollywood films too like Zindagi Tum, Jaggu, and Dada Innocent. Marina will play a prominent role in this web series. She has also revealed her feeling in an interview that she wants to see that which character her fans will accept? She also said that she is looking forward to play the role in this web series.

entry.title: 8th day of noise barrage for ABS-CBN franchise

link.title: 8th day of noise barrage for ABS-CBN franchise

entry.content: #ICYMI: On Saturday, July 18, workers and supporters of media giant ABS-CBN hold the 8th day of noise barrage in Sgt Esguerra St in Quezon City after Congress denied the network of its franchise.
entry.summary: #ICYMI: On Saturday, July 18, workers and supporters of media giant ABS-CBN hold the 8th day of noise barrage in Sgt Esguerra St in Quezon City after Congress denied the network of its franchise.

entry.title: รถล้มก็แล้ว เจ็บตัวก็แล้ว ยังจะเอา มีความตั้งใจขโมยเบอร์นี้ ยอมให้นางไปเถอะ !!

link.title: รถล้มก็แล้ว เจ็บตัวก็แล้ว ยังจะเอา มีความตั้งใจขโมยเบอร์นี้ ยอมให้นางไปเถอะ !!

entry.content: สงสัยหาซื้อไม่ได้ ! สาวขโมยต้นไม้พร้อมกระถางหนีลอยนวล เฟซบุ๊กเพจ Useless Talk โพสต์คลิปจากกล้องวงจรปิดเผยให้เห็นผู้หญิงสาวคนหนึ่งขับรถมอเตอร์ไซค์มาจอดที่บริเวณหน้าบ้านที่อยู่ติดริมถนน มองซ้าย มองขวา ก่อนก้มตัวไปหยิบกระถางต้นไม้ แต่เหตุการณ์ไม่คาดคิดก็เกิดขึ้น ระหว่างก้มตัวไปหยิบกระถางต้นไม้ มือซ้ายได้ไปบิดคันเร่งทำให้รถมอเตอร์ไซค์พุ่งล้มไม่เป็นท่า ขโมยสาวก็ยังไม่ละความพยายาม พอยกรถที่ล้มขึ้นได้เธอก็เดินมายกต้นไม้พร้อมกระถางไปวางที่รถของเธอ ก่อนขับหนีอย่างลอยนวล
entry.summary: สงสัยหาซื้อไม่ได้ ! สาวขโมยต้นไม้พร้อมกระถางหนีลอยนวล เฟซบุ๊กเพจ Useless Talk โพสต์คลิปจากกล้องวงจรปิดเผยให้เห็นผู้หญิงสาวคนหนึ่งขับรถมอเตอร์ไซค์มาจอดที่บริเวณหน้าบ้านที่อยู่ติดริมถนน มองซ้าย มองขวา ก่อนก้มตัวไปหยิบกระถางต้นไม้ แต่เหตุการณ์ไม่คาดคิดก็เกิดขึ้น ระหว่างก้มตัวไปหยิบกระถางต้นไม้ มือซ้ายได้ไปบิดคันเร่งทำให้รถมอเตอร์ไซค์พุ่งล้มไม่เป็นท่า ขโมยสาวก็ยังไม่ละความพยายาม พอยกรถที่ล้มขึ้นได้เธอก็เดินมายกต้นไม้พร้อมกระถางไปวางที่รถของเธอ ก่อนขับหนีอย่างลอยนวล

entry.title: ENG vs WI 2nd Test, Day 5: Ben Stokes smashed brilliant half century in 2nd Innings वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: ENG vs WI 2nd Test, Day 5: Ben Stokes smashed brilliant half century in 2nd Innings वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
England declared their 2nd innings at 129 for 3, managing to add 92 runs in 11 overs to their overnight score, thanks mainly to Ben Stokes’s unbeaten 78 off 57 balls, to set West Indies a target of 312 runs to win from 85 overs.
इंग्लैंड और वेस्टइंडीज के बीच तीन मैचों की टेस्ट सीरीज का दूसरा मुकाबला मैनचेस्टर में खेला जा रहा है। मैच के चौथे दिन दूसरी पारी में इंग्लैंड ने 2 विकेट के नुकसान पर 37 रन बनाए थे और उसके पास कुल 219 रन की बढ़त हासिल थी। 5वें दिन इंग्लैंड ने बेन स्टोक्स के तूफानी अर्धशतक के दम पर वेस्टइंडीज को 312 रन का लक्ष्य दिया है, बेन स्टोक्स ने 57 गेंदों पर 78 रन की शानदार पारी खेली, कप्तान जो रुट के साथ उन्होने शानदार पार्टनरशीप बनाई ।
#ENGvsWI #2ndTest #Day5 #BenStokes
entry.summary: England declared their 2nd innings at 129 for 3, managing to add 92 runs in 11 overs to their overnight score, thanks mainly to Ben Stokes’s unbeaten 78 off 57 balls, to set West Indies a target of 312 runs to win from 85 overs. इंग्लैंड और वेस्टइंडीज के बीच तीन मैचों की टेस्ट सीरीज का दूसरा मुकाबला मैनचेस्टर में खेला जा रहा है। मैच के चौथे दिन दूसरी पारी में इंग्लैंड ने 2 विकेट के नुकसान पर 37 रन बनाए थे और उसके पास कुल 219 रन की बढ़त हासिल थी। 5वें दिन इंग्लैंड ने बेन स्टोक्स के तूफानी अर्धशतक के दम पर वेस्टइंडीज को 312 रन का लक्ष्य दिया है, बेन स्टोक्स ने 57 गेंदों पर 78 रन की शानदार पारी खेली, कप्तान जो रुट के साथ उन्होने शानदार पार्टनरशीप बनाई । #ENGvsWI #2ndTest #Day5 #BenStokes

entry.title: Russian Skater Who Competed For Australia Dead At 20

link.title: Russian Skater Who Competed For Australia Dead At 20

entry.content:
Ekaterina Alexandrovskaya was born in Russia but competed for Australia in the 2018 Olympics.
According to CNN, the skater has died at the age of 20 in Moscow. Details surrounding her death are unknown at this time.
The ISU is shocked by the news of Ekaterina’s passing. ISU President Jan Dijkema International Skating Union in a statement on the organization’s website.
Alexandrovskaya skated with her Australian partner Harley Windsor in 2016.
Words can not describe how I feel right now, I am devastated and sick to my core about the sad and sudden passing of Katia. Harley Windsor Instagram post
entry.summary: Ekaterina Alexandrovskaya was born in Russia but competed for Australia in the 2018 Olympics. According to CNN, the skater has died at the age of 20 in Moscow. Details surrounding her death are unknown at this time. The ISU is shocked by the news of Ekaterina’s passing. ISU President Jan Dijkema International Skating Union in a statement on the organization’s website. Alexandrovskaya skated with her Australian partner Harley Windsor in 2016. Words can not describe how I feel right now, I am devastated and sick to my core about the sad and sudden passing of Katia. Harley Windsor Instagram post

entry.title: ‘Jamás pensé estar aquí en Valdebebas felicitando al Real Madrid’

link.title: ‘Jamás pensé estar aquí en Valdebebas felicitando al Real Madrid’

entry.content: José Luis Martínez-Almeida, alcalde de Madrid, aseguró este viernes que el Real Madrid es justo vencedor de una Liga Santander que tendrán "siempre presentes los aficionados del fútbol”, ya que se disputó bajo circunstancias especiales debido a la pandemia del coronavirus.
entry.summary: José Luis Martínez-Almeida, alcalde de Madrid, aseguró este viernes que el Real Madrid es justo vencedor de una Liga Santander que tendrán "siempre presentes los aficionados del fútbol”, ya que se disputó bajo circunstancias especiales debido a la pandemia del coronavirus.

entry.title: Ces communes qui ont maintenu les festivités

link.title: Ces communes qui ont maintenu les festivités

entry.content:
Certaines communes ont maintenu les feux d’artifices à la veille de la fête nationale. A Hem dans le Nord, 4 000 personnes ont profité du spectacle dans le respect des gestes barrières.
Dernières vérifications des feux d’artifices. Une mécanique bien rodée pour Frédéric Boutry, gérant d’une entreprise de spectacles pyrotechniques. En temps normal il organise près de 250 spectacles par an, contre 6 seulement cette année dont celui de Hem.
Avant même la tombée de la nuit les premiers visiteurs sont arrivés dans le centre de Hem. Port du masque, gel hydroalcoolique et comptage du public pour ne pas dépasser 5 000 personnes.
entry.summary: Certaines communes ont maintenu les feux d’artifices à la veille de la fête nationale. A Hem dans le Nord, 4 000 personnes ont profité du spectacle dans le respect des gestes barrières. Dernières vérifications des feux d’artifices. Une mécanique bien rodée pour Frédéric Boutry, gérant d’une entreprise de spectacles pyrotechniques. En temps normal il organise près de 250 spectacles par an, contre 6 seulement cette année dont celui de Hem. Avant même la tombée de la nuit les premiers visiteurs sont arrivés dans le centre de Hem. Port du masque, gel hydroalcoolique et comptage du public pour ne pas dépasser 5 000 personnes.

entry.title: Omer series Episode 1 complete in urdu & hindi language

link.title: Omer series Episode 1 complete in urdu & hindi language

entry.content: Omar (Arabic: عُمَرْ‎) or Omar Farouk (Persian: عمر فاروق‎) is a historical[1][2] Arab television drama miniseries-serial that was produced and broadcast by MBC1 and directed by the Syrian director Hatem Ali.[3] Co-produced by Qatar TV, the series is based on the life of Omar ibn Al-Khattab, the second Caliph of Islam, and depicts his life from 18 years old until the moments of his death.[3] The series had to face large controversy[4][5][6][7][8][9][10] due to its depiction of Omar, Abu Bakr, Uthman and Ali, the four Rashidun Caliphs,[11] along with other characters, who some Muslims believe should not be depicted, much like Mohammad. The series consists of 31 episodes and was originally aired in the month of Ramadan since July 20, 2012.[12][13][14] It was made at a cost of 200 million Saudi riyals and filmed in Morocco, primarily in the cities of Marakesh, Tangiers, El Jadida, Casablanca and Mohammedia. After the series was broadcast on MBC, it was dubbed into several languages for international broadcast[15][16][17] and subtitled in English on YouTube; it received great support from many different scholarly bodies and people watching it.[18][19][20] As the series depended largely on reliable historical established facts, the series did not face criticism in terms of its content, as past films faced.
entry.summary: Omar (Arabic: عُمَرْ‎) or Omar Farouk (Persian: عمر فاروق‎) is a historical[1][2] Arab television drama miniseries-serial that was produced and broadcast by MBC1 and directed by the Syrian director Hatem Ali.[3] Co-produced by Qatar TV, the series is based on the life of Omar ibn Al-Khattab, the second Caliph of Islam, and depicts his life from 18 years old until the moments of his death.[3] The series had to face large controversy[4][5][6][7][8][9][10] due to its depiction of Omar, Abu Bakr, Uthman and Ali, the four Rashidun Caliphs,[11] along with other characters, who some Muslims believe should not be depicted, much like Mohammad. The series consists of 31 episodes and was originally aired in the month of Ramadan since July 20, 2012.[12][13][14] It was made at a cost of 200 million Saudi riyals and filmed in Morocco, primarily in the cities of Marakesh, Tangiers, El Jadida, Casablanca and Mohammedia. After the series was broadcast on MBC, it was dubbed into several languages for international broadcast[15][16][17] and subtitled in English on YouTube; it received great support from many different scholarly bodies and people watching it.[18][19][20] As the series depended largely on reliable historical established facts, the series did not face criticism in terms of its content, as past films faced.

entry.title: Inazuma Eleven GO Galaxy #14 - Resistance Inazuma Japan! HD ENG SUB

link.title: Inazuma Eleven GO Galaxy #14 - Resistance Inazuma Japan! HD ENG SUB

entry.content:
Inazuma Eleven GO Galaxy #14 - Resistance Inazuma Japan! HD ENG SUB
This is Inazuma Eleven GO with English SUB i hope you like it !
If you want the other videos mind drop a sub and a like so i know you guys like it.
Uitgezonden op Disney XD
Copyright: Disney XD and Anime.
Alsjeblieft geen haat want ik doe dit ook voor de lol ;)
Dit kanaal is bedoelt om alle Inazuma Eleven videos erop te zetten met de beste kwaliteit en echt alle videos! Ik missen er geen een.
En misschien nog Inazuma Eleven GO.
Ik weet dat er al veel videos zijn van Inazuma Eleven in het Nederlands maar dit zijn de aller beste!
Support : paypal.me/ejexx
@justinheijkoop_

If you want the other videos mind drop a sub and a like so i know you guys like it. Uitgezonden op Disney XD Copyright: Disney XD and Anime. Alsjeblieft geen haat want ik doe dit ook voor de lol ;) Dit kanaal is bedoelt om alle Inazuma Eleven videos erop te zetten met de beste kwaliteit en echt alle videos! Ik missen er geen een. En misschien nog Inazuma Eleven GO. Ik weet dat er al veel videos zijn van Inazuma Eleven in het Nederlands maar dit zijn de aller beste! Support : paypal.me/ejexx @justinheijkoop_

entry.title: Découverte du week-end : une balade pas comme les autres

link.title: Découverte du week-end : une balade pas comme les autres

entry.content:
Ce week-end, en Haute-Savoie, le festival “La grande balade” a réuni une centaine d’artistes sur la station de Semnoz.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Nathalia Kaur के BEACH LOOK उड़ा देगा आपके होश Nathalia Kaur Bikni Look Viral Boldsky

link.title: Nathalia Kaur के BEACH LOOK उड़ा देगा आपके होश Nathalia Kaur Bikni Look Viral Boldsky

entry.content:
Bollywood actress and Brazilian model Nathalia Kaur continues to express her presence after sharing her bold photos on the day. Meanwhile, many bikini and hot photos of the actress are raising the temperature in the internet world. Natalia Kaur is seen in a very glamorous look while posing photoshoot in bold style on the sea shore.
बॉलीवुड एक्ट्रेस और ब्राजीलियन मॉडल नतालिया कौर आए दिन अपनी बोल्ड फोटोज शेयर करने के बाद मौजूदगी जाहिर करती रहती हैं। इस बीच अदाकारा की कई बिकिनी और हॉट फोटोज इंटरनेट की दुनिया में तापमान बढ़ा रही हैं। आइए इन सभी डालें एक नजर । नतालिया कौर समंदर किनारे बोल्ड अंदाज में फोटोशूट कराते हुए काफी ग्लैमरस लुक में नजर आ रही हैं। नतालिया कौर ब्लैक मोनोकिनी में अपनी इस फोटोज से फैंस के दिलों में खलबली मचा रही हैं।
#NathaliaKaur #NathaliaKaurBeachLook #NathaliaKaurBikniLook
entry.summary: Bollywood actress and Brazilian model Nathalia Kaur continues to express her presence after sharing her bold photos on the day. Meanwhile, many bikini and hot photos of the actress are raising the temperature in the internet world. Natalia Kaur is seen in a very glamorous look while posing photoshoot in bold style on the sea shore. बॉलीवुड एक्ट्रेस और ब्राजीलियन मॉडल नतालिया कौर आए दिन अपनी बोल्ड फोटोज शेयर करने के बाद मौजूदगी जाहिर करती रहती हैं। इस बीच अदाकारा की कई बिकिनी और हॉट फोटोज इंटरनेट की दुनिया में तापमान बढ़ा रही हैं। आइए इन सभी डालें एक नजर । नतालिया कौर समंदर किनारे बोल्ड अंदाज में फोटोशूट कराते हुए काफी ग्लैमरस लुक में नजर आ रही हैं। नतालिया कौर ब्लैक मोनोकिनी में अपनी इस फोटोज से फैंस के दिलों में खलबली मचा रही हैं। #NathaliaKaur #NathaliaKaurBeachLook #NathaliaKaurBikniLook

entry.title: Tina Turner, Kygo Release New ‘What’s Love Got to Do With It’ Remix RS News 7 17 20

link.title: Tina Turner, Kygo Release New ‘What’s Love Got to Do With It’ Remix RS News 7 17 20

entry.content: Tina Turner has come out of retirement at age 80 to release a Kygo remix of her 1984 mega hit, “What’s Love Got to Do With It.” The new dancefloor-ready rendition also comes with a new visual.
entry.summary: Tina Turner has come out of retirement at age 80 to release a Kygo remix of her 1984 mega hit, “What’s Love Got to Do With It.” The new dancefloor-ready rendition also comes with a new visual.

entry.title: 3 beautiful and eco-friendly products for the summer

link.title: 3 beautiful and eco-friendly products for the summer

entry.content: This year, many of us have put sustainability on the back burner. But the good news is that many brands make fantastic products that make our lives better without polluting the planet. Here are some eco-friendly products for the summer.
entry.summary: This year, many of us have put sustainability on the back burner. But the good news is that many brands make fantastic products that make our lives better without polluting the planet. Here are some eco-friendly products for the summer.
